title: What other famous artist you want to draw Evangelion
display_title: What other famous artist you want to draw Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: What other famous artist you want to draw Evangelion?             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Jul 12, 2009 6:15 pm I'm not sure if this was done before but what famous artist you want to draw Evangelion (Like a picture of Unit 01 or anything that has to do with the series)? It can be a Manga artist like Kentaro Mirurai (Berserk), Takeshi Obata (Death Note) or Akira Toriyama (Dragon Ball). How about American artist just for curiousity reasons and that some of them might make it look good like Jim Lee (Uncanny X-Men #248), Todd Mcfarlane (Spawn), Frank Miller (Sin City), Mike Mignola (Hellboy), Alex Ross (Kingdom Come), Marc Silvestri (Cyberforce), or David Finch (New Avengers #1-6,).

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Jul 12, 2009 6:19 pm Craig McCracken Seth Macfarlane and in all seriousness Satoshi Kon

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Sun Jul 12, 2009 6:31 pm It is boring to pick artists that are all so... animesque. I choose AMANO.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun Jul 12, 2009 6:33 pm some of these may not be what you'd expect Eva-wise, so you've been warned IMO, there's only one man above all the other weeboos, and it's this guy this man is a strong second though and there's this American here's another American and here's one for Mexico

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Sun Jul 12, 2009 6:56 pm I'd stay far FAR away from Studio Ghibli, since I understand they shared responsibility for the series' animation (and it shows... Ep. 11 has some screwed up character models being tossed around, and it got on my nerves). I wouldn't mind seeing how Goseki Kojima could have handled something like this ( Lone Wolf & Cub ); it'd certainly be a very different interpretation, that's for sure. Existentialist Mecha Character Drama by-way-of Samurai Epic storyboarding just sounds cool. As far as Western artists go, Frank Quietly's at the top of my list. And if it were in a print medium, I'd say J.H. Williams (I think he'd really nail the mindfuck moments WAY better than Sadamoto's halfassed attempts that pop up in the canonical manga). Dave Sim offers an exceptionally beautiful flavor of photorealism (such as Glamourpuss , currently in syndication, and also certain aspects of Cerebus ), and it'd be interesting to see his take on how to portray a story like Evangelion. Certain parts of Cerebus already reflected his capacity as both an artist and a writer to adapt that kind of narrative.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Jul 12, 2009 7:05 pm Artist I would like to see Draw Eva: H.R Giger (Alien) Mike Mignola (Hellboy) Kentaro Yabuki (Black Cat) Masashi Kishimoto (One Piece. Evangelion with a cartoony look might be interested to see) Yoshiki Takaya (Bio Booster Armor Guyver) Kazushi Hagiwara (Bastard!! Though he probably hates it. But he would make Rei 10X hotter at least) Dave Gibbons (Watchmen) Akira Toriyama (Dragon Ball) Todd Mcfarlane (Spawn. He would make Unit 01 in berserk mode look like a total monster) Rob Liefeld (For the lulz) Denis Beauvais (The AVP comics from Dark Horse) I will add some more later.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jul 12, 2009 7:17 pm Guyver Spawn wrote: Artist I would like to see Draw Eva: H.R Giger (Alien)

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jul 12, 2009 8:40 pm I'd be curious to see what Hajime Sorayama might do with a redesign of the plugsuits... or maybe an eva, for Reichu's sake.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sun Jul 12, 2009 9:16 pm Tsutomu Nihei. Besides excellent character design he goes into a lot of detail with mecha and architecture. He did a Unit-01 painting that's in his artbook "BLAME! And So On." Check it out. And he did the illustration for my present avatar... http://i543.photobucket.com/albums/gg457/oedipusfoot/blame_and_so_on-013.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Jul 12, 2009 10:18 pm I came in here to say Giger, but was beaten to it twice. So yeah.

[]:             Quote Post by NickFury90 » Sun Jul 12, 2009 10:39 pm Merridian wrote: Frank Quietly.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Jul 12, 2009 11:09 pm I'm liking a lot of the suggestions I'm seeing here, guys. :) Ashley Wood J. Scott Campbell Jim Lee Bruce Timm (oh wait, he already did, YAY

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Jul 12, 2009 11:39 pm Katsuya Terada Tatsuyuki Tanaka Koji Morimoto Also, I second Tsutomu Nihei and H.R. Giger.

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Sun Jul 12, 2009 11:59 pm Ashley Wood definitely. His recent comics have been great and his new series coming look good too. Would love to see what he could do with his stylish look.

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Mon Jul 13, 2009 12:09 am Andy Warhol. Just to see what crazy stuff he comes up with.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 13, 2009 1:12 am Merridian wrote: American Frank Quietly

[]:             Quote Post by holdmelikeonnaboo » Mon Jul 13, 2009 2:03 am Suehiro Maruo Jun Hayami Junji Ito Just for the hell of it It would probably end up with Shinji licking Asuka's eyeball while someone is being defecated on

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Mon Jul 13, 2009 2:24 am don't know wich artist i can choose, Anno did pretty much the best i can imagine, so i chose someone for Music, K? Hans Zimmer or Steve Jablonski

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 13, 2009 7:38 am i_Love_Asuka wrote: don't know wich artist i can choose, Anno did pretty much the best i can imagine, so i chose someone for Music, K? Hans Zimmer or Steve Jablonski

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Mon Jul 13, 2009 8:58 am The Eva Monkey wrote: i_Love_Asuka wrote: don't know wich artist i can choose, Anno did pretty much the best i can imagine, so i chose someone for Music, K? Hans Zimmer or Steve Jablonski
